payload.answer: Source unavailable; no article content committed.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article’s contents as durable memory because the source could not be retrieved; only retain the retrieval failure context.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced URL could not be fetched, so no stable article entity or content can be resolved.

payload.intent: Remember an article reference for future context, but the fetch failed.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt was made to remember the article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture context, but the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: Referenced article URL recorded as an unavailable source.
No substantive article facts stored due to 404 fetch failure.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working mirror.
Store only the source reference until content becomes available.
